response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video: 00:00-00:27 is talking. 2. Identified the song from on-screen text: "All Alone With You", "作詞・作曲:ryo (supercell)". 3. Performed search for "All Alone With You ryo supercell lyrics". 4. Retrieved Japanese lyrics and English translation. 5. Mapped scenes to the provided JSON schema.
response.global_summary: The video features a talk by a VTuber, followed by a vocal performance of the song "All Alone With You", originally composed by ryo (supercell).

scenes.description: The VTuber talks to the audience, introducing the song. No vocal music is playing.
The VTuber performs the song "All Alone With You". Text on screen identifies the composer as ryo (supercell).
